# Senior Frontend Engineer

Join the product engineering team building our customer-facing web
application. You'll own the experience from pixel to bundle, partnering
closely with design and backend.

## What you'll do

- Build production-grade UIs in React and TypeScript. Components that are
  accessible, performant, and easy for the rest of the team to maintain.
- Own the design system contributions: turn Figma into reusable, typed
  components.
- Care about web vitals — page loads, layout shift, interaction
  responsiveness. You profile before you optimize.
- Make accessibility a default, not a checkbox: keyboard navigation,
  screen-reader semantics, contrast, motion preferences.
- Collaborate with backend engineers on API design. You'll push back
  when a contract makes the client awkward.
- Participate in code review. Frontend code reviews are about state
  modeling and accessibility as much as syntax.
- Take part in the on-call rotation when frontend or BFF issues escalate.
- Help keep the build pipeline fast and the test suite trustworthy.

## What you bring

- 5+ years building production web frontends.
- Deep React + TypeScript. Hooks, suspense, real understanding of
  rendering and reconciliation, not just patterns.
- Familiar with at least one state management approach for non-trivial
  app state (Redux, Zustand, React Query, signals).
- Practical experience with build tooling (Vite, esbuild, webpack
  internals when something breaks).
- CSS that's not a struggle. Modern layout, design tokens, animation
  judgment.
- A11y experience that goes beyond knowing the rules.
- CI/CD discipline: you ship behind flags when it matters and you don't
  break the build.

## Stack

React 18, TypeScript, Vite, TanStack Query, Tailwind, Storybook,
Playwright, GitHub Actions.
